PRO TEM JUDGE JOHN T GUADALABENE. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT AND DEFT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT PUT ON THE RECORD IN OPEN COURT BY PLTF'S COUNSEL. JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF AGAINST THE DEFT. PLTF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOKLEY, ELROY RAY, LINDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34 TURK ST, #726, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAY-02-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 5PM, 5-2-94. EACH PARTY BEARS THEIR COSTS & FEES. PL. RETAINS SEC. DEP. IN CONSIDERATIN FOR WAIVING RENT & DAMAGES, DEF.W WAIVES ALL CLAIMS AGAINST PL. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
